title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
